statement: In every magma, Equation 249 (`x = (y * (z * z)) * w`) implies Equation 2801 (`x = ((y * z) * (y * w)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0502
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z z)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op y w)) z)
